prompt: Create an empty state UI component in HTML and CSS for a 'Recent Transactions' section where the user has no transactions yet. Include all the elements it needs to be useful and inviting, not just a blank box. Output a single self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS.
assertions: Contains a call-to-action element (button or link) encouraging the user to take action
The copy is friendly and explanatory — not just a terse message like 'No transactions found'
Includes a visual element beyond just text (icon placeholder, illustration area, or decorative graphic)
Uses hsl() color notation for colors
